query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, COUNT(CASE WHEN signalScore > 0 THEN 1 END) as with_score, COUNT(CASE WHEN currentPrice IS NOT NULL AND currentPrice != '' THEN 1 END) as with_price FROM watchlistStocks WHERE isActive = 1;
